name: Voter Action Project Research
subject: Poll: Runoff elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=OzmqL2JKeaGT60LwFhksn/ZHDf6gaGxwXcb6U+NEjhOP8cg4qVQZxdmWESU+niMcu33od+gt4sP9qhU/v6z+48XnQR+jdE3XeXcebYUh94U=]
Fox 5 Atlanta: Georgia secretary of state calls for end of general election runoffs [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/F5ATL_EndRunoffs.png]
Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger has said that he wants the Georgia General Assembly to end the Peach State's use of general election runoffs. In a statement, Raffensperger called on Georgia officials to get rid of the runoff process, which costs taxpayers millions of dollars each time it has to be used.
Historians have found that most general election runoff systems were designed to limit participation, specifically of minority groups.
We want to hear from voters with their thoughts on this. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should states eliminate the runoff system and declare the candidate with the most votes from the general election the winner?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=OzmqL2JKeaGT60LwFhksn/ZHDf6gaGxwXcb6U+NEjhOP8cg4qVQZxdmWESU+niMcu33od+gt4sP9qhU/v6z+48XnQR+jdE3XeXcebYUh94U=] NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=OzmqL2JKeaGT60LwFhksn/ZHDf6gaGxwXcb6U+NEjhOP8cg4qVQZxdmWESU+niMcu33od+gt4sP9qhU/v6z+48XnQR+jdE3XeXcebYUh94U=]

name: Deb
subject: Can I send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Cooking has always been a way for me to foster connection and build community.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2192%2E400544%2Ef6pVBN)
Hey – it’s Deb.
One thing you should know about me is that **I love to cook.**
My love of cooking New Mexican cuisine started early, thanks to the hours I spent watching my grandmother bake bread in her mud oven and stir huge pots of posole. She wouldn’t let us kids in the kitchen while she cooked, but I’d perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours. I still hold those memories close as I prepare my favorite traditional New Mexican dishes.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250525_2_posole?amount=5&refcode=em20250525-2192&refcode2=2192_400544_f6pVBN&akid=2192%2E400544%2Ef6pVBN)
_New Mexico chiles – the best in the world!_
**There’s something powerful about connecting with others over a home cooked meal.** When I was in law school at UNM, I’d make chicken green chile stew for student gatherings, and I made that same dish for my Congressional colleagues during the 2019 winter holiday season. I even cooked chile and tortillas for the water protectors when I traveled to Standing Rock during the protests against the Dakota Access Pipeline.
Cooking became more than a hobby after I decided to start my own salsa business. I worked out of a commercial kitchen and bought my red chile pequin from a farm in northern New Mexico. I’d prepare my salsa and deliver jars to mom-and-pop shops across the state, often with Somáh riding with me in the back seat.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250525_2_posole?amount=5&refcode=em20250525-2192&refcode2=2192_400544_f6pVBN&akid=2192%2E400544%2Ef6pVBN)
_Here’s Somáh posing with jars of my homemade salsa. Kids in New Mexico start early... 🌶️_
**For me, cooking has always been a way to foster connection and build community, which is exactly what we’re doing now as we grow our campaign for New Mexico.** I’ve had the chance to sit down with New Mexicans in living rooms and at kitchen tables to hear about their lives, their struggles, and their hopes for the future. Every conversation is another reminder of the incredibly high stakes in this race – and proof that if we organize around our shared values, we will win.
[**Will you donate $5 to power our grassroots campaign? If you donate through this link today, I’ll even send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250525_2_posole?amount=5&refcode=em20250525-2192&refcode2=2192_400544_f6pVBN&akid=2192%2E400544%2Ef6pVBN)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250525_2_posole?amount=5&refcode=em20250525-2192&refcode2=2192_400544_f6pVBN&akid=2192%2E400544%2Ef6pVBN)**
Happy cooking,
Deb 🌶️
P.S. Throughout my life, cooking has helped me bring my community together – and bringing people together is exactly how we’ll win this campaign. [**If you make a donation of any amount through this link today, I’ll be sure to send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole so you can cook it for your friends and family.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250525_2_posole?amount=5&refcode=em20250525-2192&refcode2=2192_400544_f6pVBN&akid=2192%2E400544%2Ef6pVBN)
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=2&akid=2192%2E400544%2Ef6pVBN)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=3&akid=2192%2E400544%2Ef6pVBN)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: Every American deserves healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Do you agree?
#

**Do you agree?** _Every American deserves access to healthcare._ | [YES](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-healthcare-202505?t=1&akid=8963%2E614464%2ETirTvu) [NO](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-healthcare-202505?t=2&akid=8963%2E614464%2ETirTvu) [I'm not sure](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-healthcare-202505?t=3&akid=8963%2E614464%2ETirTvu)
---
**Right now, Republicans in Congress are trying to gut Medicaid — which provides lifesaving health coverage for over 70 million Americans.**
That’s just the latest attack on healthcare for everyday people in America. Republicans have been at this for decades, and we all know that their attacks won’t stop here.
So please, will you confirm with us:
**_Do you agree that every American deserves access to healthcare?_**
[YES](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-healthcare-202505?t=4&akid=8963%2E614464%2ETirTvu) [NO](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-healthcare-202505?t=5&akid=8963%2E614464%2ETirTvu) [I'm not sure](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-healthcare-202505?t=6&akid=8963%2E614464%2ETirTvu)

body:
Here’s why:
| | | | [](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc1u3CAUhZ8G77Dwxb8LL9I4jhSpkaJG7RIxgMdMAVOM7UyfvrLlzvbwXTgfl1tv9HBvUfUNAYxazggA0ScE8PQBv358qhdV4e5nyDF_UW_v-yk8n-gKD9gJXlny_BU-Ypgzd_--bOE3X7MHH-9ePejz1VRZrs2eVl0iWxA1CJGoNqvyGiCDCpKxLWVT00bwhpZZIwtCqYBLlRNOpBxoQxPdAoGCFFCSjGSkSctLIwnll5qTuqhqinKyaZfKyXEjbzEs1qdisolpxxj9fFTqEfSzEktQ6aZdUHInEPQHjR2Pep_GYrJWx6gUvg0CQW88Hgd8aGBtPbbKTngtEe2XaJlVUi8W0e70LPdwnpYgFKKd8cx4Ng5nLrj1XF8dot3pU7DoBNPWn7eycWDyKMSM_z81uahcRLTb9aJCUDJntES0u73_VWtR2GE7wmO3tHt7_bp-vv_JX5PQSr9pY_RcVign173j8S9rC_8CAAD__zIEqbI)

**Thank you for taking the time to read this message.**
Just months ago, in a beautiful Pennsylvania field, an assassin’s bullet ripped through my ear.
But I knew then, and I believe now more than ever, that God spared my life for a reason: **to Make America Great Again.**
In just 100 days, we’ve delivered historic wins—**what many are calling the most successful start to any presidency in history.**
But with our success has come an unhinged backlash, fueled by radical Democrats.
It’s not about me. It’s about their fear of **YOU** and this moment. They don't want to fix this country. They want to erase everything we’ve built!
**That’s why I need you. We must defend every seat in Congress—and expand our majority in the House and Senate.**
**_[This is your moment to make a difference. Whether it’s your time, your voice, or your contribution. We need all hands on deck.>](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kdFupCAUhp8G7zB4ULEXXnRrbdJkmzSd7F4ahOPILCCrONN5-43Gnduf78D_caQL1gz3mogfBGA0eiEAhD8TgOdP-P11wlcUtPk151S-4vvHdgovB3qFB-yVFI69fM-fcV4yf_-53uY_8po9-HgP-KCPV1N00tgtFU2ia1AVKJVgnYm8AshAQDLWZVEOIhu0YIOUEnkvJPQsYxXXRcFln5gaGBSsgJJlLGNPadk_acZlX0lWFaLiJGc341M9eWn1Jc6rC6maXGLrMcaw7JVaAu2Cap0xvRk_o94IAu1OUy-j2aapmpwzMSLSy6AItDbQcaC7BjUuUIduoteS8HaNrnOozeoIbw7PcguXaZ0VEt7Y0NnQjcORK-mCNGdPeHP4FF30qjMuHLd249DpvVBnw_-pyUf0kfBm04tIoOy8NZrwxl1O4oSX_OtlD_fd8ub97ft8-vibvyVzrcPNWGuWUpCcnbeO-79ca_gXAAD__wk6qek)_**

Thank you, and God bless you.
Donald J. Trump 47th President of the United States

clean_body: Here’s why: | | | | Thank you for taking the time to read this message. Just months ago, in a beautiful Pennsylvania field, an assassin’s bullet ripped through my ear. But I knew then, and I believe now more than ever, that God spared my life for a reason: to Make America Great Again. In just 100 days, we’ve delivered historic wins—what many are calling the most successful start to any presidency in history. But with our success has come an unhinged backlash, fueled by radical Democrats. It’s not about me. It’s about their fear of YOU and this moment. They don't want to fix this country. They want to erase everything we’ve built! That’s why I need you. We must defend every seat in Congress—and expand our majority in the House and Senate. Together, we will continue winning—and of course, Make America Greater than ever before. Thank you, and God bless you. Donald J. name: Team Heartland Patriots
subject: We still have time to make up for this lull
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
If everyone reading this chipped in just $3, we’d blow through our end-of-month goal before the weekend is over.
#
Peter — it’s been a few days since we told you about our end-of-month fundraising goal and we just wanted to check in with an update.
After we launched our $10,000 goal on Thursday, we saw a small surge of support. If you were part of that — thank you, it was exactly what we needed to start off strong!
But now that we’ve entered the weekend, online donations have slowed way, way down just like we expected. _That means we’re tracking behind where we need to be._
**The good news is that we still have time to make up for this lull.**
If everyone reading this email chipped in even just $3, we’d blow through this goal before the weekend is over. But not everyone will, so we’re asking you directly, Peter:
**[Please, will you chip in $3 or more toward our end-of-month goal right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88739?refcode=em20250525-8953&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8953%2E614464%2EXVjc5U)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $3](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88740?refcode=em20250525-8953&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=3&t=2&akid=8953%2E614464%2EXVjc5U) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88740?refcode=em20250525-8953&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=8953%2E614464%2EXVjc5U) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88740?refcode=em20250525-8953&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=8953%2E614464%2EXVjc5U) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88740?refcode=em20250525-8953&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=8953%2E614464%2EXVjc5U) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88740?refcode=em20250525-8953&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=8953%2E614464%2EXVjc5U) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88740?refcode=em20250525-8953&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=8953%2E614464%2EXVjc5U) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88739?refcode=em20250525-8953&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=8953%2E614464%2EXVjc5U)
---
Our movement to elect leaders who are unbeholden to any corporate elite or special interest has never been more important — and it’s entirely funded by real people like you. We seriously couldn’t do this work without your help.
Thanks for everything you do, Peter. And enjoy your weekend!
Team Heartland Patriots

subject: Your Star-Spangled Steal: Made in America Hat Now $30!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Beer, burgers, and our Made in America HAT!

|
---
| | | __**Picture this:**__

You're strolling down Main Street, the smell of sizzling burgers and hot dogs wafting through the air, the sound of laughter and lawn games filling your ears. The sun is shining bright, casting a warm glow over the entire scene. American flags wave proudly in the breeze, a reminder of the freedom and sacrifice that makes days like this possible.

**[And you're soaking it all in, wearing the ultimate symbol of patriotism: our Made in America hat.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zth6q4v082hdgto6dck6shd0t3jjrptvd5jmgph0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor2cth2bs "And you're soaking it all in, wearing the ultimate symbol of patriotism: our Made in America hat.")** The envy of all your friends and family, this hat is more than just a stylish accessory - it's a badge of honor, a declaration of your love for the land of the free and the home of the brave.

---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6j8ufaff4tbkfpq7gr1stdlpp3khim32vehk7m8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor2cth2bs)
---

**[For a limited time, we're offering this iconic hat for just $30- a steal for a piece of American-made quality that will last you for summers to come.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgv4duhffafc9iqbieujhqbqpjpdsau4jd39vqe8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor2cth2bs "For a limited time, we're offering this iconic hat for just $30 – a steal for a piece of American-made quality that will last you for summers to come.")**Whether you're lounging by the pool, grilling up a storm, or just enjoying a cold one with the gang, our Made in America hat is the perfect way to top off your Memorial Day look.

_So what are you waiting for?_ Get ready to make some unforgettable memories in the most American way possible. Treat yourself to our Made in America hat today and get ready to take on the summer in star-spangled style!

**[Limited Time Offer: Get Your Made in America Hat for $30!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkfbatq4859jng060jv7gv5rs425aqmevoipvhc0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor2cth2bs "Limited Time Offer: Get Your Made in America Hat for $30!")**

---
| | | [SHOP NOW](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z92k43pe82uj27qes68aqqkpdpvimr0mvg04pme8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor2cth2bs "SHOP NOW")
---
Honor the brave men and women who've fought for our freedom, and celebrate the American spirit with a hat that's as tough as the country it represents. **[Order now and get ready to make this a Memorial Day to remember!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2616g2vque45s5mn7ingeslmf6818ouovfu519g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor2cth2bs "Order now and get ready to make this a Memorial Day to remember!")**

Best,
House Republicans

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Find someone who will love you like Democrats love illegal gangsters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
It’s time to continue our offense against these Democrats who favor illegal immigrants over American citizens.

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuud2utlto4oa6tpbvo49omoej651rgq39brci1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h2bs)
Friend,

I jokingly posted on X: Find you someone who will love you like Democrats love illegal gangbangers from El Salvador.

Of course, it’s not completely a joke.

Senator Van Hollen is flying to El Salvador to try to return MS-13 gangsters to America. Yes, you read that right: A sitting US Democrat Senator is attempting to bring an illegal, non-citizen, MS-13 gang member BACK into America.

Let’s recap how we got here:

**FIRST:** Biden did NOT follow due process and allowed over 20 MILLION illegals to enter our nation.

**NEXT:** 20 MILLION illegals not only strain our schools, hospitals, housing, and other essential services, but many are members of criminal organizations that are killing our citizens.

**THEN:** President Trump pledges to the American people to deport illegal immigrants. President Trump wins a MAJORITY of American votes. He carries out his promise.

**NOW:** Democrats, including corrupt judges, are bending over backward to stop deportations...

Friend, let me be blunt.

It’s time to continue our offense against these Democrats who favor illegal immigrants over American citizens.

Door knocking, phone calls, turning out the vote. That’s how we won over the youth vote in 2024. That’s how we’ll defeat these Democrats again.

[I am urgently asking you to send these Democrats a message. Join me today by donating $10, $47, $100, or even $250 today. _If you become a monthly donor at $10 / month, I’ll send you a copy of my new book_ Right Wing Revolution.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfdfkj6ov33nkiqhpff7ru7bnur03vte4b6pmd20_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h2bs)

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here... I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.

It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkjn3f30uud23q56ukkht8hlvnukbf70u1v11pk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h2bs)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z61bsfpoqpgu1qhntid68ifrd4tsmut6q5tj2v20_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h2bs)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmfnrqcb051792jn8jl1c82u3ksurogkvdfc6kg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zling8dhgtndcblu4c9708d836anr8eo7hf895a8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8bcfmuaf8n3qvmv9u0snuke5lcvbtm7gp463ca0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h2bs)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zomseretis020mcbitb59raarp4g8g9c0dh3abo8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h2bs) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd1uhh0qnf72d6idnj3pa1h8v6t4kb9m763g29qg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h2bs)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zak8av2eh3i4e12kfgobuahgv8tirpaqb1aj5njo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h2bs)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjh7o10so8lrqtj7amq005kcnh97lfopfkf856d8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h2bs)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn3dgsgilh7h881o5l19nf62e1bcsqgdpc2et5j8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[unsubscribe](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2z6j4psjmptf2trgpjl7vg6kau0pa4i6v9gsp6hn0) PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl9h1ldeo3tfs9tpa2nsr0mv753r27v9pl44kovo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshgm2o75cdge49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zie918la3ndmecb16sjcvvdg57o73e9sicv35f5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h2bs)_

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo81elqjiike56mj35ihtmcn25foi4uovthn7jjg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor1c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Will I see you there?
body:
Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvt7h928e7mukaguom7lteh0mg5o4os9n9bjgjh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor3c3h2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z34c4r8jdugbf441hplj6jtblgq7o4i63m6uc24g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor3c3h2bs)** If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeo25ik10hmlril7a7l21k7vvtcs026mnoc3imi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor3c3h2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9d7r7qut6uebagfkebu46ceeu5qbq494a7i6bbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor3c3h2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0ardus7tlgel6jr1pcetvmqmi2n0c2632jdjcc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor3c3h2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2eostmib4cv6vkg57vktq649v7kj38bc6s8kpf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor3c3h2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu34gkc9mq7v25ah43gl2eb3tgk09rju6q70tqh8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor3c3h2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsouval67137blshcg4bt6guttvs4a8kbj1bcgb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor3c3h2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values!**[**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0vt718l4c6vo4fll8t32goad5srbgcpf9meiio8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor3c3h2bs)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **Brave Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **Brave Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **Brave Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.**I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...**...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That’s why I hope you’ll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z94k53jbb8060evnl9aee6pt5616bsjv9pkbrdko_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor3c3h2bs)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.**Brave Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[**please consider a sponsorship gift of $175.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs7q4daaprk0h81rr7heps33j7vf0jd6jj2650vg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor3c3h2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower please get your sponsorship gift in within the next 48 hours so we know how many libraries we can get into this August!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvliqkev3on4g6oo2o7nhud8ldonb8grg1e4s9f8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor3c3h2bs)**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2shi06uhl3h08tb3js3ap94n9vuo9infp35tsb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor3c3h2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze3p5sscum3tunvtjtcqm108kh3hgtfl9vccj4hg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor3c3h2bs)
---
Kirk Cameron
---

clean_body: Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours? | | | | | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|--- Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrg0qb49cnrdgt2bmk6060jepnnfefah2f7lel1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor5cth2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zud1cqipm214po7ivqea1d6rt6kpot38ae7ec1qo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor5cth2bs) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq67qa5nm5siso0b3m4c4b2ne6frl12sao63ahgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor5cth2bs)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2q4qrj3f7pt4no2mkuog63vkp1ntrk8fbu7rh70_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor5cth2bs)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4sjbuvo327agtp9d83dpfnuqk38afupvunbpop8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor5cth2bs)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmfrm705qm8hrm1niuqbr1if7vj5n31bad39mlgo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor5cth2bs), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z714814ti27ia7s45hjig8u69vifq3be3lvquet0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor5cth2bs)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---

---

---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6qb4cak9c2b1ktd0mei9pd46jmau3g07jgpi6c0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imcor5cth2bs) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here... I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.

It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcj16r2k0tl949r66chm04nab1vk80a7ngkuolg0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9im2pb6c9h2bs)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6i86epg0pqh1jbdr00473ideehmlj9orjoipd68_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9im2pb6c9h2bs)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zda5id58a72e8c0o43itfjafl3fc35js2v0upo68_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9im2pb6c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3me84s8k00s4e3v4llnmr8i3q3vbq58trn192bo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9im2pb6c9h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkgf35r5r0lqnqi158sqe6mi85nqciedojl7rt80_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9im2pb6c9h2bs)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6eh8f9v1dusla13qgov8ut8fmgsghjir8tsmgk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9im2pb6c9h2bs) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zookc26kchnbep3pfkh0rt741ftknr6di4blgmf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9im2pb6c9h2bs)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8d3lqskecvi1r07578ln9epgo8dfsabsf95j5j0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9im2pb6c9h2bs)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here... I’m grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.

It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt20qkii28q8fuvool77qcfo87u3k8u32h9m1ado_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imaob6c1h2bs)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbcbhddcbac0bl4f3dpgihjr3a2tpsmdvlu7j5bg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imaob6c1h2bs)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3kg3c9gh7kegutfde23jd0t1f01qhdfe4finbfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imaob6c1h2bs)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1g2e468c0u0durqdqrfm91b75109ifovheahc4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imaob6c1h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zspdastdb5c6e9s3ivr4o6m6hfl3sv73v8vpioe8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imaob6c1h2bs)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zofc0aqr7h8d63ll1esgle5d1gkl36iah4l2uog0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imaob6c1h2bs) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zicvjj6npuehjvg5qbsufka5j9bfn85jb7tcqj40_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imaob6c1h2bs)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv0ilrg8f0cj4g9g465oq498g1gduq4ir2qhl0vo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imaob6c1h2bs)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade

body:
Finally, fix your sleep

Tell me if this sounds familiar...

It's 2am and you're still staring at the ceiling...

You just can't seem to shut your brain off...

Your mind races a million miles an hour...

Maybe you can't stop thinking about money issues, health problems, or even something embarrassing you did or said...

Then, perhaps you finally DO fall asleep...

...only to jerk awake at 4am, knowing the next day you're going to feel tired, worn-out, and like a brain-dead zombie.

Does any of that ring a bell?

Well, just months ago... that was me...

I never slept more than 4 hours...

I felt exhausted, groggy, and dog-tired all the next day, downing pots of coffee to get through work...

And I turn into a cranky "you-know-what" when I don't catch my zzz's... so I was getting into all of these stupid little arguments with my wife.

I had to do something... or I would spend the rest of my nights on the couch.

And that's when I stumbled on a discovery from leading MIT sleep researchers... and it changed everything.

You see, this discovery led to my research team and I developing a technique we call the "sleep signal reset."

Just [do this 20 minutes before you hop into bed...](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6r7qd3vnkv8s9bb4qtdtphobdamtohur6qk06g8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6clh2bs)

And you'll gently activate your body's "go-to-sleep" hormones...

So you fall asleep faster than a baby riding in a car...

Sleep through the ENTIRE night...

...and wake up fully rested and chipper, ready to take on the day.

Best of all, it literally takes less than a minute...

It requires no dangerous drugs, meditation, valerian root, blackout shades, blue-blocking sunglasses, or any other weird stuff...

Just [do this about 20 minutes before bedtime](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4thdb9oadtl91172mesp2d24ff501qhi78gj01o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6clh2bs) and you'll get the peaceful, restorative sleep you deserve.

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7ntrtm5bg3lqtq8cqpbfhgdau8kfo79kkm641n8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6clh2bs)

==> [**Can't Sleep? Do This 20 Minutes Before Bed...)**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmbb3ldgpo0gj1bg0u7stp04urh0pl9eqf4ealkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6clh2bs)

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo

|
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z46ud120ugk24gilm8e0ajs2dkh4shqf4goeubeo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6cjh2bs) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjuo73em89jsnfluv9e52kija16mbpvbqnia3m1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6cjh2bs)
[Donate >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zscb79758n9ue8nbhir5tt9bojugk10fnvso1au8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6cjh2bs)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd36gtt95004o9glq1rvbdo0q0fhi5s91ak1p6o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1rcftem4t5jtlqhb16bq8jt2hhu554fb8dgab88_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5l2eg2hne711pdn4rbbgr42fjg68p5e8ls3jhvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbe1p9hg1ff5flb4457pbca78uoms3k2hh0jp65g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9nbjiaqd9si8tcreue47t9ulos68bqci6eqmna8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlv5vmcalprgt9u2lgp35b0tuoave1aiqh1bbtf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zosif6b1rs9gjaes6hrhspgvejus3cgknrpt81gg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoqppstaj7rnln0sq8vgjgf2nb94mpoijnups360_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6cjh2bs)
Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4v58tf17f9gl19lim0ksboik784l8svav4viio8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6cjh2bs)

Thank you for everything,

James O'Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zingh3c7l0nkq0reieq0v1l8u225j4ba8hmobn4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6cjh2bs) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zit9bb89ghpqkuloiasp9g1vispe5144083nui20_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj6cjh2bs)

Thank you,

James

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._

name: America First Alerts
subject: President Trump just dropped a BOMBSHELL about Joe Biden’s use of his autopen in office.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MULLIN VICTORY FUND**
body:
Please take one second to read this:

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmhc7a3276f7747qc9anaib9c7tg1052b6mmnrko_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj2c5h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcuahcmfup8e6ttrg7n4gjd0m536839it0191be0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9imeoj2c5h2bs)
_**President Trump just dropped a BOMBSHELL, patriot.**_

And it’s something every MAGA Republican needs to see.

In plain view and to every major news outlet in America, President Trump laid everything out:

_**"We’re going to start looking into this whole thing with who signed this legislation. Who signed the legislation opening our border? I don’t think he knew. And now I find out, that it wasn’t him (Biden). He autopenned it.**_ ”

And our President couldn’t be any closer to the truth.

Since 2020, it was readily apparent to every Republican that Joe Biden was unfit to hold office - his cognitive decline was on _**FULL**_ display.

But the Radical Left MSM played wingman for his administration and did everything in their power to **_COVER IT UP._**

But now, the cat is out of the bag.

It’s more apparent than ever that Joe Biden was simply a figurehead, while shadowy figures behind him signed bills into law under his name.

This is a historical _**FAILURE**_ of leadership, and a full investigation must be undertaken to hold those who _**DAMAGED OUR COUNTRY**_ are held accountable.

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbujqmu6sp1r7r490lugd9suqn3o1md66ncn2dng_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9im9o34cth2bs)
---
| |
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3aevc6vkjqjpc0ugnf1buh45s6f2dncr8fijqoo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9im9o34cth2bs) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5gaghpvq2d6oevhl9op0q28aif1bftt6ga9l0io_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9im9o34cth2bs)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Fisico via American Action News
subject: Control - Can't Sleep? Do This 20 Minutes Before Bed
body:
Finally, fix your sleep

Tell me if this sounds familiar...

It's 2am and you're still staring at the ceiling...

You just can't seem to shut your brain off...

Your mind races a million miles an hour...

Maybe you can't stop thinking about money issues, health problems, or even something embarrassing you did or said...

Then, perhaps you finally DO fall asleep...

...only to jerk awake at 4am, knowing the next day you're going to feel tired, worn-out, and like a brain-dead zombie.

Does any of that ring a bell?

Well, just months ago... that was me...

I never slept more than 4 hours...

I felt exhausted, groggy, and dog-tired all the next day, downing pots of coffee to get through work...

And I turn into a cranky "you-know-what" when I don't catch my zzz's... so I was getting into all of these stupid little arguments with my wife.

I had to do something... or I would spend the rest of my nights on the couch.

And that's when I stumbled on a discovery from leading MIT sleep researchers... and it changed everything.

You see, this discovery led to my research team and I developing a technique we call the "sleep signal reset."

Just [do this 20 minutes before you hop into bed...](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk2t66rlni4f08i9jk9es78tcat2b7p76s7h7440_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9hm0o76cdh2bs)

And you'll gently activate your body's "go-to-sleep" hormones...

So you fall asleep faster than a baby riding in a car...

Sleep through the ENTIRE night...

...and wake up fully rested and chipper, ready to take on the day.

Best of all, it literally takes less than a minute...

It requires no dangerous drugs, meditation, valerian root, blackout shades, blue-blocking sunglasses, or any other weird stuff...

Just [do this about 20 minutes before bedtime](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu0f1vvhthgn3872lqc0rj7ekjn2ihq4c0lfrq4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9hm0o76cdh2bs) and you'll get the peaceful, restorative sleep you deserve.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z70512kni4imis06hsgl8h3nfurh0afvldmdt7o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9hm0o76cdh2bs)

==> [**Can't Sleep? Do This 20 Minutes Before Bed...)**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zifj175ppg117cegu9mnl36qerdg5kp2bh980utg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0s9hm0o76cdh2bs)

name: Rep. Mike Soboleski
subject: Memorial Day 2025
body:
| | |

---
---
| |
---
| |
---
Peter,
This Memorial Day, we pause to honor the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our nation. It is a solemn day of remembrance, reflection, and gratitude.
Mainers have answered the call with courage, resilience, and an unwavering sense of duty. Our shipyards have built vessels that have safeguarded freedom across the globe, and our communities have raised generations of service members whose integrity and valor reflect the very best of our state.
Let us carry forward their legacy, not just in words, but in our commitment to the values they gave their lives to defend: liberty, justice, and unity.
We will always be grateful.
Mike Soboleski Rep. Mike Soboleski Proudly Serving House District 73
---

clean_body: | | | | | == | | | | Peter, This Memorial Day, we pause to honor the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our nation. It is a solemn day of remembrance, reflection, and gratitude. Mainers have answered the call with courage, resilience, and an unwavering sense of duty. Our shipyards have built vessels that have safeguarded freedom across the globe, and our communities have raised generations of service members whose integrity and valor reflect the very best of our state. Let us carry forward their legacy, not just in words, but in our commitment to the values they gave their lives to defend: liberty, justice, and unity. We will always be grateful. Mike Soboleski Rep. Mike Soboleski Proudly Serving House District 73 | | | | | == | | | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | Maine Issues & Action PAC | PO Box 603 | Augusta, ME 04332 US | | | | | | |

# Monday, May 26, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1927, Henry Ford and his son Edsel drove [the 15 millionth Model T](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OpDAQxfHTmMzILj4MgYNNyHrTDVGBi8YrQyFT04jbj7o1N5j4Jz09_f89xgfGFPfnX9zIy8LjTteZSITyuNHGOWIKeAsfE-G8Cl_7iSMYaLRpNLRjwJjusS6CX4iAqoK8dXUHTW16U6weKnTWtsaixdZR33czdpOrHRC6vmmK6N9rpoHWGtOZvlyctZWhmaZQT4ZQ1YZCFM7lf467rLSkm1-Uy5m3IvlV5DhV9UfBoGC4rqtc4ymc77crGGSNpw5467jrH1EwbHhraBUMCU_5MC9640BJiz4yh69ZIu8aRS-cQ5F9OK6YUjxbp2rz3DCmzwH5VbWXh-8AAAD__1BDgnI) out of their factory, marking the iconic automobile's official final day of production. We hope you're having a restful Memorial Day as we reflect on those who served. One of the most powerful tributes this weekend is unfolding on the National Mall, where USAA's 134-foot [Poppy Wall of Honor](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uxCAUhE9jd1gY47-CIo27TZvSeiyPNQnmWYCX-PbRRsoJ0s-M5vs-busNnHfh8Q47qmxpDViSx5wxrjvuFB14A1emQyPct0wlJFgFFz3jPRPDasD5a5W1URZRYFejakc5iV7ymdebMtCh7Uc-jNPYdnoyetBgZznMvZw6KWqnXmu8F0PL-cTnxo5t23G8ozZSc4RKcjQuU2w-yYW8ofUXPTE2d9prr7acj1R1b5VYKrGUUhpL3_pMLmBKr0wlFouQz4ipEsuZANhBx3GxAt6ziPmMIbE_WGbgYgXxC4NhGwWKLG-UkD3giezVsBHR0F5HZY7ivHdpGCvJHzs4__sp_0vkU4mfAAAA___Dt4ua) returns to commemorate more than 600,000 fallen service members. Today's and tomorrow's editions are shorter so our team can spend time with loved ones. Thanks for reading--full coverage returns Wednesday! Today's sponsor is [OneHope](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOnDAQRp_GdIuGsbkVLiLx022KNCmRsccwkS8IvLvat482yRukPdJ39On8vC93w4HT9t1E0sXnJdHrClQKnUukmE82wZl3ycdKxu4lv9JlFgRsb9DesFuc4fBeVOW0J0KSFemmVwO2Ckaodr0q66RvLPh2QBzX1fvRqxXAd11j-rFi_bFBi10DMMBY-75pJJCl1akVyAgF5Ljks_6VOZWdfHjnJ521zbEKei_luIT8JnAWOG_85LTVOdGeD6oTFYHzYTYSOGN7S9nuHJzP55ZLoRStkPOjxOXKj9OSkNP8Vy6w--BIjh9RyOkrGg7_oDXxMLwlIadp_oEtDF8xVKd2x4tD4KvrhYLtM_hzsfxX16fG3wEAAP__OTKOgw), a global ministry dedicated to sharing the Gospel with children in some of the world's hardest-to-reach places.
