name: John Fetterman
subject: honoring our fallen heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1001&akid=10108%2E434096%2Ea1ZJS_ ]John Fetterman

Derek,

This Memorial Day, we honor the generations of brave servicemembers who answered our nation’s call and gave their lives in defense of our freedoms.

Their sacrifice is the foundation of the safety and strength we enjoy today.

It’s on us to remember the cost of our liberty and to live in a way that honors the fallen heroes who made the ultimate sacrifice.

As we reflect on their courage, I hope you’ll join me in recommitting to keeping their legacy alive – not just on Memorial Day, but always. 🇺🇸

With gratitude,

John ❤️

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1002&akid=10108%2E434096%2Ea1ZJS_

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Reflecting on Memorial Day
body:
Remembering those who gave their all for America
| | | |

|
---

| Patriot-

---
| **** On Memorial Day, we recognize the men and women who, throughout our nation's history, gave their lives so the rest of us could remain free. America would not be the land of the free and the home of the brave without their sacrifice. We also remember and extend our gratitude to the families who carry the weight of that sacrifice every single day.
As we pause to reflect on all our fallen service members have given, let us remember that the fight for liberty continues.
>From all of us at Tea Party Patriots Action, may you have a meaningful Memorial Day.

In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************

America would not be the land of the free and the home of the brave without their sacrifice. We also remember and extend our gratitude to the families who carry the weight of that sacrifice every single day. As we pause to reflect on all our fallen service members have given, let us remember that the fight for liberty continues. From all of us at Tea Party Patriots Action, may you have a meaningful Memorial Day. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin **__ ** ******** | | | | | This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved. "" Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to: 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314Woodstock, GA 30189 Want to change how you receive these emails?You can "" or http://$\[li:updateprofile\]$/.**

subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.
| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/Tg8yX_MH0kZdirBV7gyDGoDoSNI6cKWQwDnkOsU1OF2t3J1UUy6_E1VsXqFIRwwjnhwM4Mo2KVLXEJcckvwCaxDLRgYvtaqU4yrqOLeuXPgpRcLVm-sO3CSX7DgwW6vEkpJ3pDWVFflFcaV8lsVDniZKF0rRZEjaJR2hF6flTglMs66mTFypLg47/6Kzv6Bo8HIpS7SLciRqb9O0sFAv2tAti/9)_

| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/xSBRy8pnnFz7GcA91RI5fwB9iHSUUFCrL9K9dAmVOY7WQuPe6U3PBPUW1CJ2t328T2pZM-mSD65ZFpUnS3BHHhzfBg7OABQvCk_9Y8Mxkd904AiQdt1hFxntz33guTX-a2SK_TYzkvHtKVFmdFXjUM-8GPqZjb4uRzqX4wZxGd54kCnbkb_zD5tK1Xu7eaho_b81WBSleVHw3ryYdu3LM7IjAKGRndBkv9Iq7VX1Anx2u9ikgYmy3NaWVrVlBTRL4IJdmQ7NWGoSRsTzwGbQIdzs6Vq4znlH3eHkX73PVYfAXIMYyX7Cl5SCaZBWrBc6KGecmBMJsBbN_sKY7X_F4rqSZGzAeY1UHflPr5QG-BIYME01iqBPN5EB2Wvji7bgTal_ALvYW_AD8V4aW_1BBuQKY2LrAPTOX6_eYLoFAAWHr6p2Z4aRWD8t4fQFSx15MQ/VCQKzr7p-deTNtMcFjVp5fMqQ9D2QytN/9) [NO](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/0CYELF_087MbGlHvIZwdP_YnVqnYopQ0f0sIh3f13r7n9awV4Tb0-RhFT-9FUu4j9VjwaZaT1BUNOTkWxWzR3warcZ_ubK6I57YJl_8Jdf_qpWnFUC5jNoUekQemYOHA95ufKtdL4qHtep32Aes-vfqw9ikv4kWPK1sGeFQH4JdcO6nejjjXxnxpbG8wr0WXwJZ1Z_VcgmPqynYPE17FH2axK-l8CE_P43wMpx3jAx8dwtTD-A9MHgxPY2fOG3XPMP7dyR-5a_FWl0g9uXTSTVvDJR2Sm1FuDEy3DyHCXUsQMWPnity3Ube8hMNfkFybcu71DguGasp-ozqZ1sNJtsq3pymA1UzgdixUdTLTrgScdTDjukaTJ0AxormmKpyCSCpz6PqRhpE_KzvKcVHKO2dbdSXabMzJeMJf8yl3wjkQpUvU7dkUrXpCCtaPM5qedA/rjML1wvixe3aNHDsoHHNBHz9dYxfw2RR/9) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/BPCGMXYiLcEoenRd1E00s_-4x2vwLlYuvm6JBndFX-O-U5m-u77IwZDNvZ370nv94p2W3QQsTAvsK_zUrIvtJm2a56b0UxOqzw99_06DpSBX2NIblenCyt6IBsFzN3ttI1u5w4e3CiCJoFhH3zlGyAYBJKqu6SF8kC-XnZuIyJ_i98xJ-O7rB-PWCI1Zh0kkugxxXJaW-XuZYAcokd-7Wdyo_D3DzaGaPgzgUU-sh5uvzLWGjLaH-Uzn8go9lnSlSFGfoSExNeIB6MUmemwTLwT194yV85zBMV683CbtFwGIYh80nYrNE1qyTS9Sr63MjDz7voQz-7j7U0vLaxAoBmxCq2E_zuDmy4nle01b3ail7goQwGP5G6FCmUjmZH5ovjGh09sEcGuIUdK4buzA3TzSp4Lja4CA12ZLnqj9nNclJ13DoEDF3IpC54TsckCaeA/ElMQQUfPwttgt3QHSZPoUpnw8st40KRY/9)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/aF8PgAiYhgmOjsVM3cI1nkVNttkYpE5EK_E8KM051wJcBER1YJxlku6qfiz85gahdbHiev_H03gCka_O5mtfkka1KkVhM9ymg_lVZa24BGO0s23eLAofx6KlEF2j_m-uQIwBDsZOjgdP1yerA3OdZr-cPAZL4kMgw_ld8MXD-6wqeVQQZhPQvH_Z8eLXg0T591Nbrdqa9jztuOGth7C6sRpUuTkTOt8CD-6GKCo3ccYu_vJpuOIMmrPxjrDxNP1-Kl-rNoj_t7RzeFWLqDl2ZGHA6tZGxdfutDkbO8QNwMqobmDpqdeA1AYOSttMegFW8RHEvvoLpO0psujtyqCYQv30rdvmH5h77-RWHn5RSqfdbkFO3Ij3CwueAr_XmvHYTnwD4IRwqsympLo84IxGXSvCBDsYQNR4dUPGeDbjS-Qs5EYGdAPp8Fp791L1A0tQWA/fCYHKmwSojWD2E8G1PDZrxzN-LOTJt5_/9)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Build Alaska's Future
subject: Honoring the Past, Protecting Democracy—Your Support Matters
body:
On this Memorial Day, we honor the patriots who gave their lives to defend our democracy—their sacrifice ensured that freedom would endure and that the voices of everyday Americans could shape the future. Their commitment was unwavering, their courage undeniable, and their belief in a government of, by, and for the people remains the foundation of our nation.| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, On this Memorial Day, we honor the patriots who gave their lives to defend our democracy—their sacrifice ensured that freedom would endure and that the voices of everyday Americans could shape the future. Their commitment was unwavering, their courage undeniable, and their belief in a government of, by, and for the people remains the foundation of our nation. But today, democracy faces new threats—not just from foreign adversaries, but from within. Misinformation, disengagement, and attacks on transparency are eroding trust in the institutions built to serve the people. Honoring their legacy means safeguarding our future, ensuring the ideals they fought for remain strong for generations to come. At [Build Alaska’s Future](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108392656/547773095/-1512324198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NThiYTRhMS00MTNhLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSOxHldqWWHceVSmefQAWzqHOnLCC0Q8E2Qfz5i9L7w=&emci=71fcf56b-af39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=558ba4a1-413a-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9512399), we are carrying forward this fight—not with weapons, but with knowledge, civic engagement, and fact-based advocacy. Our mission started in Alaska, but the challenges we face here reflect broader national struggles, and we are taking direct action to ensure Americans everywhere understand the stakes. **HOW WE'RE MAKING AN IMPACT**
* **Amplifying Facts Over Fear:** Our Spring Initiative is driving media campaigns to educate Americans on the consequences of federal funding shifts. Through radio ads, digital outreach, and grassroots engagement, we’re ensuring that communities understand what’s at stake. [Listen to our latest radio ad](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108392657/547773096/-1361474580?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NThiYTRhMS00MTNhLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSOxHldqWWHceVSmefQAWzqHOnLCC0Q8E2Qfz5i9L7w=&emci=71fcf56b-af39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=558ba4a1-413a-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9512399).
* **Unifying Voices in Critical Conversations:** We have launched a series of forums, partnering with nonprofits, universities, and other key stakeholders to provide expert analysis and community discussions on the risks posed by declining federal investments. These conversations explore how funding delays, cuts, or cancellations could weaken long-term economic stability—issues that affect communities across the country. ****[Watch the discussion](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108392658/547773097/-803653937?v=9IeaqWLf1vY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NThiYTRhMS00MTNhLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSOxHldqWWHceVSmefQAWzqHOnLCC0Q8E2Qfz5i9L7w=&emci=71fcf56b-af39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=558ba4a1-413a-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9512399).****
* **Turning Data Into Stories That Resonate:** We have documented more than 4,000 federal infrastructure projects to ensure transparency in funding allocation. But numbers alone aren’t enough—we are working to bring these projects to life through personal narratives, GIS mapping, and video storytelling to illustrate their real-world impact.****[Explore the project](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108392659/547773098/2003048360?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NThiYTRhMS00MTNhLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSOxHldqWWHceVSmefQAWzqHOnLCC0Q8E2Qfz5i9L7w=&emci=71fcf56b-af39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=558ba4a1-413a-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9512399)**.********

**HOW YOU CAN SUPPORT THIS WORK ** On this day of remembrance, we ask you to help continue the fight for democracy and truth—both in Alaska and across America.
* **Tax-Deductible Donations – Education & Transparency**
Support public education, outreach tools, and interactive data work by contributing to the Build Alaska’s Future Education Fund at [BuildAlaska.org](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108392660/547773099/2003048360?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NThiYTRhMS00MTNhLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSOxHldqWWHceVSmefQAWzqHOnLCC0Q8E2Qfz5i9L7w=&emci=71fcf56b-af39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=558ba4a1-413a-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9512399). As a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit, all donations are tax-deductible and directly fund initiatives that promote transparency and fact-based civic engagement.
* **Non-Tax Deductible Investments – Messaging & Action
**Strengthen our ability to advocate for balanced, bipartisan leadership by contributing to the BAF Action Fund at [BAFaction.org](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108392661/547773100/1172432375?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NThiYTRhMS00MTNhLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSOxHldqWWHceVSmefQAWzqHOnLCC0Q8E2Qfz5i9L7w=&emci=71fcf56b-af39-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=558ba4a1-413a-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9512399). The Action Fund is a registered 501(c)(4) social welfare organization, meaning it can receive unlimited donations from individuals, companies, and institutions. Unlike 501(c)(3) nonprofits, 501(c)(4) organizations can engage in political campaign activities, supporting policies and candidates who align with our mission—which is critical to ensuring that federal leadership remains rooted in facts, transparency, and problem-solving.

**WE'RE ALL IN THIS TOGETHER** Our work started in Alaska, but democracy is under threat everywhere. That’s why we are actively collaborating with leaders in other states to share our model, ensuring that fact-based advocacy and transparency reach beyond our borders. If you have local contacts who would benefit from this approach, we would love an introduction. This Memorial Day, let’s recommit ourselves to protecting democracy—just as those we honor today did in their time. Together, we can ensure that truth, accountability, and civic engagement remain the cornerstone of our future. With gratitude,
The Build Alaska’s Future Team
---

_Build Alaska’s Future Education Fund is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit dedicated to transparency and public engagement around infrastructure investments across Alaska. By providing innovative tracking tools and highlighting impactful community stories, BuildAlaska.org supports sustainable economic growth and informed civic participation statewide._ _Build Alaska’s Future Action Fund is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit and grassroots social welfare organization dedicated to promoting democracy, transparency, and balanced politics._

Honoring their legacy means safeguarding our future, ensuring the ideals they fought for remain strong for generations to come. At , we are carrying forward this fight—not with weapons, but with knowledge, civic engagement, and fact-based advocacy. Our mission started in Alaska, but the challenges we face here reflect broader national struggles, and we are taking direct action to ensure Americans everywhere understand the stakes. HOW WE'RE MAKING AN IMPACT Amplifying Facts Over Fear: Our Spring Initiative is driving media campaigns to educate Americans on the consequences of federal funding shifts. Through radio ads, digital outreach, and grassroots engagement, we’re ensuring that communities understand what’s at stake. . Unifying Voices in Critical Conversations: We have launched a series of forums, partnering with nonprofits, universities, and other key stakeholders to provide expert analysis and community discussions on the risks posed by declining federal investments. These conversations explore how funding delays, cuts, or cancellations could weaken long-term economic stability—issues that affect communities across the country. **. Turning Data Into Stories That Resonate: We have documented more than 4,000 federal infrastructure projects to ensure transparency in funding allocation. But numbers alone aren’t enough—we are working to bring these projects to life through personal narratives, GIS mapping, and video storytelling to illustrate their real-world impact.**.****** HOW YOU CAN SUPPORT THIS WORK On this day of remembrance, we ask you to help continue the fight for democracy and truth—both in Alaska and across America. Tax-Deductible Donations – Education & Transparency Support public education, outreach tools, and interactive data work by contributing to the Build Alaska’s Future Education Fund at . As a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit, all donations are tax-deductible and directly fund initiatives that promote transparency and fact-based civic engagement. Non-Tax Deductible Investments – Messaging & Action Strengthen our ability to advocate for balanced, bipartisan leadership by contributing to the BAF Action Fund at . The Action Fund is a registered 501(c)(4) social welfare organization, meaning it can receive unlimited donations from individuals, companies, and institutions. Unlike 501(c)(3) nonprofits, 501(c)(4) organizations can engage in political campaign activities, supporting policies and candidates who align with our mission—which is critical to ensuring that federal leadership remains rooted in facts, transparency, and problem-solving. WE'RE ALL IN THIS TOGETHER** Our work started in Alaska, but democracy is under threat everywhere. That’s why we are actively collaborating with leaders in other states to share our model, ensuring that fact-based advocacy and transparency reach beyond our borders. If you have local contacts who would benefit from this approach, we would love an introduction. This Memorial Day, let’s recommit ourselves to protecting democracy—just as those we honor today did in their time. Together, we can ensure that truth, accountability, and civic engagement remain the cornerstone of our future. With gratitude, The Build Alaska’s Future Team | | | Build Alaska’s Future Education Fund is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit dedicated to transparency and public engagement around infrastructure investments across Alaska. By providing innovative tracking tools and highlighting impactful community stories, BuildAlaska.org supports sustainable economic growth and informed civic participation statewide. Build Alaska’s Future Action Fund is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit and grassroots social welfare organization dedicated to promoting democracy, transparency, and balanced politics. | | | Build Alaska's Future - 645 G St #100-1122 Anchorage, AK 99501 - Manage your subscription preferences here: .

Peter,

Today, we honor the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country. They fought to defend all of us and to ensure that the promise of America will live on for generations to come.

Let us remember these brave servicemembers on this day and every day, support the families they left behind, and honor them by doing all that we can to keep our democracy and our shared liberties alive and strong.

I wish you all a safe and reflective Memorial Day.

Thank you,

Seth

name: David Hogg
subject: Thinking about my dad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Today, I want to talk about the best father I could ever have.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250526-1&t=1&akid=2181%2E587540%2EEOLPE6)
David Hogg here. I want to talk to you about my dad:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250526_1_memday?refcode=em20250526-2181&amount=5&refcode2=2181_587540_EOLPE6&akid=2181%2E587540%2EEOLPE6)
My dad was a helicopter pilot, FBI agent, teacher and the best father I could ever have. He was diagnosed with early-onset Parkinson’s 16 years ago, and in September, he passed away.
During the final years of his life, I watched my parents struggle to get the VA disability benefits that he was entitled to. Now, the Trump administration is planning to cut more than 80,000 jobs from the VA, which will make it even more difficult for disabled veterans to provide for their families and access the care they deserve.
So this year on Memorial Day, I’m thinking of all the families like mine that have paid the ultimate price in service to this country, and recommitting myself to ensure that every single veteran has access to the care and benefits that they need.
Thanks for being in this fight.
– David Hogg
P.S. Too many folks in power are willing to look the other way while Trump slashes the VA. Help us force them to pay attention and **[chip in any amount to Leaders We Deserve today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250526_1_memday?refcode=em20250526-2181&amount=5&refcode2=2181_587540_EOLPE6&akid=2181%2E587540%2EEOLPE6)**
* * *

name: Heidi Campbell
subject: Honoring Our Heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer
body:
https://voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://voteheidicampbell.com/]
Dear Peter,
On this Memorial Day, I join Tennesseans across our state in honoring the courageous men and women who gave their lives in service to our country.
We honor their memory by the way we live, lead, and serve one another. I will always fight for a Tennessee that reflects the values they fought to protect, and I hope you will join me in recommitting ourselves to building a future worthy of their sacrifice.
I extend my deepest gratitude to those who have served, those who continue to serve, and the military families who stand beside them.
Wishing every Tennessean a meaningful Memorial Day.
Heidi
Senator Heidi Campbell is a Tennessee State Senator, representing District 20. She is championing change for Tennessee and won't rest until we see gun safety reform, corporate accountability, and a safe and prosperous community where everyone can thrive.

name: Sen. Lamont Bagby
subject: To every Virginian remembering a loved one today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
On Memorial Day, we reflect on sacrifice, service, and the values they defended.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108393197/547774927/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGQyYzAyZi00MjNhLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MhiKCcarFiOjok3cD9FGKhHtIg_N5b_ALTOhQHQa9w4=&emci=35193edd-fd37-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b4d2c02f-423a-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15759664)
---
Dear Derek, This Memorial Day, we pause to honor the brave service members who gave their lives in defense of our country. We remember them not only for their courage, but for the values they swore to protect — freedom, justice, and democracy. For many Virginians, today is personal. It’s a day of reflection. A day of grief. A day to remember loved ones lost too soon, and to lift up the families who carry their memory forward. As Chairman, I want to say clearly: We will never forget the cost of the freedoms we enjoy, and we’ll never stop working to ensure those freedoms are extended equally to every American. Whether you’re observing today quietly or gathering with loved ones, I hope you’ll join me in reflecting on the legacy of those we’ve lost and recommitting ourselves to a more just and inclusive future in their honor. In remembrance, **Sen. Lamont Bagby**
Chairman
Democratic Party of Virginia

---
Peter — Every day, America’s servicemembers and their families put duty above all else. On Memorial Day, we come together to honor the men and women who selflessly sacrificed their lives for our country. We honor their courage and unwavering commitment to the promise of America. They gave everything to ensure we could hold on to a democracy rooted in equality, justice, and freedom. Today is not only about gratitude – it's also a recommitment to action. We must work to ensure our Gold Star and military families, veterans, and their loved ones have the care and support they’ve earned through their service and sacrifice. And for each of us, it’s a solemn reminder of the cost of freedom. We must all do our part to build a better nation and protect the rights so many have fought to defend. Let’s continue to stand together for those who stood for us. In remembrance and with respect, Katherine

name: Senator Steve Daines
subject: In Memory of our Fallen Heroes and their Families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
As we gather this Memorial Day, my thoughts turn to the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedom. |
---
Fellow American,

As we gather this Memorial Day, my thoughts turn to the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedom. As the son of a United States Marine, I grew up with a deep understanding of what it means to serve and the weight carried by those who wear the uniform. Our fallen heroes embody the courage and selflessness that define America, giving their lives to protect the values we hold dear. Their sacrifice is a solemn reminder of the cost of liberty and the strength of our nation’s spirit.

The sacrifices of our service members ripple beyond the battlefield, touching the lives of the friends and families who bear the burden of their absence. These families—parents, spouses, children—carry the legacy of their loved ones with quiet resilience, as they navigate the pain of loss. Memorial Day calls us to honor not only those who fell but also the families who live with their sacrifice every day.

Today, we reflect on the deep commitment to our nation’s values that drove our service members to stand in harm’s way. Their sacrifice reminds us to cherish the freedoms we enjoy and to never take them for granted.

As we pause to remember, let’s commit to keeping the memory of our fallen alive through our actions. Let’s support their families, strengthen our communities, and work toward a nation worthy of their sacrifice. This Memorial Day, may we honor our heroes by living with the same resolve and unity they exemplified.

With deepest respect,

_**Steve Daines**_

Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.

**Senator Steve Daines

Let’s support their families, strengthen our communities, and work toward a nation worthy of their sacrifice. This Memorial Day, may we honor our heroes by living with the same resolve and unity they exemplified. With deepest respect, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Honoring sacrifice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://jenaforcolorado.com/]
Friends,
Today, we pause to honor the brave men and women who gave their lives in service to our country. Their sacrifice is the foundation of the freedoms we hold dear.
As we remember them, I’m reminded of what it means to serve—and what’s at stake when our rights and freedoms come under attack. Public service is about protecting the values so many have fought to defend.
On this Memorial Day, let’s honor their legacy by continuing the work of building a more just, free, and inclusive future for all Coloradans.
Thank you,
Jena Griswold

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Monday News Digest: 5/26/2025 🇺🇸
body:
A special Memorial Day message from RMV
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**May 26, 2025** **MONDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Dear Readers,
This weekend, as families gather, flags wave, and barbecue grills fire up across the country, we pause to remember the **true meaning of Memorial Day** —a day not for celebration, but for solemn tribute.
We honor the men and women who gave everything in service to our country. They didn’t just wear the uniform—they laid down their lives so we could live in freedom.
From the beaches of Normandy to the mountains of Afghanistan, their sacrifice spans generations. These brave souls never came home—but because of them, we do. We wake up in a nation where we can speak freely, worship boldly, raise our families, and fight for what’s right.
Let us never take that for granted.
At Rocky Mountain Voice, our mission to tell the truth and defend liberty is only possible because of the warriors who secured that liberty with their lives. Today—and every day—we carry their legacy forward.
🇺🇸 Don't miss today's [new commentary](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from RMV contributor Amanda Hardin, who joined part of the Run for the Wall ride—an annual, cross-country motorcycle tribute to the fallen. In her words, _“Every mile has meaning.”_
So from all of us at RMV: **we remember.** We are grateful. And we will never forget.
Wishing you a peaceful and reflective Memorial Day.
In liberty and truth,
Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[“They didn’t think I had it”: Tina Peters on evidence, betrayal and faith behind bars](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In a jailhouse visit marked by resilience, revelation and restrained emotion, former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters offered a window into the chapter of her life that has largely unfolded behind bars. For two-and-a-half hours on May 18, we sat across from each other in a controlled visitation room.
**[Analyst to reveal altered Arapahoe 2020 CVR at Tuesday Capitol press conference](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A nationally recognized computer scientist will present what he says is direct evidence of vote data manipulation in Arapahoe County’s 2020 election – and altered ballot records in a newly released 2025 file – at a May 27 press conference at the Colorado State Capitol.

**[Out of order: Was DNC vice chair David Hogg undone by procedure—or politics?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) David Hogg says the Democratic National Committee (DNC) is trying to “fast-track” his removal as vice chair. The party insists it’s just following procedure. But veteran parliamentarian Gregory Carlson says what happened may violate one of the most basic principles of Robert’s Rules of Order – you can’t go back and undo a vote after the meeting is over.

|
---
**STATE**
**[Governor rejects rideshare reform bill amid corporate exit warnings](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Gov. Jared Polis on Friday vetoed House Bill 1291, a bill that would have put more teeth in regulating rideshare companies. Sponsors heavily criticized the veto, saying his claims that he cares about victims fell short and that he didn’t engage with the sponsors on the bill until three days before the end of the session.
**[Cities sue Polis over housing mandate, cite threat to local control](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Six “home rule” cities in Colorado are suing the state, alleging it has unconstitutionally usurped their local authority over land use and zoning as it pushes communities to allow denser housing development.
**[Colorado sued over law punishing ‘misgendering’: Doctors, parents cite First Amendment](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Several organizations and a western Colorado dermatologist have filed a lawsuit seeking to block specific provisions of a recently signed state law that, as originally introduced, would have defined “deadnaming” and “misgendering” as discriminatory acts but whose final version had been heavily modified.

**[From guns to gray wolves: 9 new laws reshape CPW’s future](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[SUMMIT DAILY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Over 120 days, Colorado lawmakers introduced over 650 bills in the 2025 legislative session. Among those that passed were several that will have implications for Colorado Parks and Wildlife as it tackles illegal wildlife traffic, manages hunting and sport shooting activities, continues the voter-mandated reintroduction of gray wolves and more.
**[Colorado Christian camp sues state over gender facility access mandate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A Christian camp that has been operating since 1948 in Colorado is suing the state after the camp was told that it had to accommodate gender expression in bathrooms and a variety of other spaces.

_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_

**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) On May 19, 2025, retired ICE official John Fabbricatore stepped into a new role as Senior Advisor at the Office of Refugee Resettlement, just as the agency faces intense scrutiny for failing to track unaccompanied migrant children after release.

**[Tech industry outcry stalls Colorado’s AI law as Congress weighs ban on state regulations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER7](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) U.S. Congress is considering banning states from regulating artificial intelligence for the next 10 years, adding uncertainty to the future of Colorado’s AI law. In 2024, Colorado became the first state to pass a comprehensive law regulating artificial intelligence.
**[RFK Jr’s MAHA Report exposes health crisis tied to food, meds, and mandates](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DAILY WIRE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Health and Human Services (HHS) Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. on Thursday released the highly anticipated MAHA Commission report, detailing findings on potential causes of the epidemic of Americans, particularly children, fighting chronic illnesses.

**[House passes ‘one big, beautiful bill’ in massive win for Trump](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DAILY WIRE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In a significant victory for President Donald Trump, the Republican-led House early Thursday morning passed what the president has championed as the “one big, beautiful bill,” with enough Republican holdouts coming around to support the comprehensive tax and budget package.

**🇺🇸 DID YOU KNOW?** Memorial Day was originally known as **"Decoration Day"** and observed on May 30th, not the last Monday of May. It began as a time for families to decorate the graves of fallen Civil War soldiers, honoring their sacrifice with flowers and remembrance.

clean_body: A special Memorial Day message from RMV | | | | May 26, 2025 MONDAY NEWS DIGEST By Heidi Ganahl | | Dear Readers, This weekend, as families gather, flags wave, and barbecue grills fire up across the country, we pause to remember the true meaning of Memorial Day —a day not for celebration, but for solemn tribute. We honor the men and women who gave everything in service to our country. They didn’t just wear the uniform—they laid down their lives so we could live in freedom. From the beaches of Normandy to the mountains of Afghanistan, their sacrifice spans generations. These brave souls never came home—but because of them, we do. We wake up in a nation where we can speak freely, worship boldly, raise our families, and fight for what’s right. Let us never take that for granted. At Rocky Mountain Voice, our mission to tell the truth and defend liberty is only possible because of the warriors who secured that liberty with their lives. Today—and every day—we carry their legacy forward. 🇺🇸 Don't miss today's from RMV contributor Amanda Hardin, who joined part of the Run for the Wall ride—an annual, cross-country motorcycle tribute to the fallen. In her words, “Every mile has meaning.” So from all of us at RMV: we remember. We are grateful. And we will never forget. Wishing you a peaceful and reflective Memorial Day. In liberty and truth, Heidi Ganahl | | | TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK In a jailhouse visit marked by resilience, revelation and restrained emotion, former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters offered a window into the chapter of her life that has largely unfolded behind bars. For two-and-a-half hours on May 18, we sat across from each other in a controlled visitation room. A nationally recognized computer scientist will present what he says is direct evidence of vote data manipulation in Arapahoe County’s 2020 election – and altered ballot records in a newly released 2025 file – at a May 27 press conference at the Colorado State Capitol. David Hogg says the Democratic National Committee (DNC) is trying to “fast-track” his removal as vice chair. The party insists it’s just following procedure. But veteran parliamentarian Gregory Carlson says what happened may violate one of the most basic principles of Robert’s Rules of Order – you can’t go back and undo a vote after the meeting is over. | STATE Gov. Jared Polis on Friday vetoed House Bill 1291, a bill that would have put more teeth in regulating rideshare companies. Sponsors heavily criticized the veto, saying his claims that he cares about victims fell short and that he didn’t engage with the sponsors on the bill until three days before the end of the session. Six “home rule” cities in Colorado are suing the state, alleging it has unconstitutionally usurped their local authority over land use and zoning as it pushes communities to allow denser housing development. Several organizations and a western Colorado dermatologist have filed a lawsuit seeking to block specific provisions of a recently signed state law that, as originally introduced, would have defined “deadnaming” and “misgendering” as discriminatory acts but whose final version had been heavily modified. Over 120 days, Colorado lawmakers introduced over 650 bills in the 2025 legislative session. Among those that passed were several that will have implications for Colorado Parks and Wildlife as it tackles illegal wildlife traffic, manages hunting and sport shooting activities, continues the voter-mandated reintroduction of gray wolves and more. A Christian camp that has been operating since 1948 in Colorado is suing the state after the camp was told that it had to accommodate gender expression in bathrooms and a variety of other spaces. | NATIONAL On May 19, 2025, retired ICE official John Fabbricatore stepped into a new role as Senior Advisor at the Office of Refugee Resettlement, just as the agency faces intense scrutiny for failing to track unaccompanied migrant children after release. U.S. Congress is considering banning states from regulating artificial intelligence for the next 10 years, adding uncertainty to the future of Colorado’s AI law. In 2024, Colorado became the first state to pass a comprehensive law regulating artificial intelligence. Health and Human Services (HHS) Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. on Thursday released the highly anticipated MAHA Commission report, detailing findings on potential causes of the epidemic of Americans, particularly children, fighting chronic illnesses. In a significant victory for President Donald Trump, the Republican-led House early Thursday morning passed what the president has championed as the “one big, beautiful bill,” with enough Republican holdouts coming around to support the comprehensive tax and budget package. | LOCAL Would you need a perfect GPA to speak your mind or worship freely? Mesa County officials say Colorado’s new gun law is treating the Second Amendment that way – and they’ve asked the U.S. Department of Justice to intervene. As Colorado’s housing crisis continues to stretch families, employers, and communities thin, a powerful story of unity is rising from the plains of Northeastern Colorado. The openly emotional mayor of Colorado Springs was asked to testify Tuesday about the details of his 2023 mayoral campaign season before and after a hate crime “hoax.” The Arapahoe District Attorney’s Office is defending its decision to give probation and community service to a teenager who was driving illegally and, in the country illegally, when he killed a woman. | COMMENTARY Every day, you’re marching into a battle—whether you realize it or not. The question is: are you armored up, or are you walking into a war zone wearing flip-flops and good intentions? Religion alone won’t save you. It will load you down with rules while leaving your heart exposed. Former legislator and longtime Denver public servant Dorothy Gotlieb has compiled this list of Colorado quirks and cultural touchstones. You might laugh, nod in agreement – or want to add your own. Across Colorado, churches gather each week to worship, pray, and walk in faith. From the Western Slope to the Eastern Plains, these communities share a simple but powerful calling—to love one another well. Today, that love has a chance to meet a real and urgent need. I was corresponding with someone recently and they mentioned something interesting. This person is a lawyer and said they were in a 10th circuit (Federal) courtroom recently and overheard an appellate case out of New Mexico about gun control. | Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\) or send us a message on social media to chat! | 🇺🇸 DID YOU KNOW? body:
| | | Hi team, it's Chuck Schumer. This is going to be a longer email, but I've been burning the midnight oil on our strategy to take back the Senate -- and _I need you in on it to win._

**If you can't stick around for the details right this second, here's the highlight:** Democrats are energized and united, with a game plan to defend our nation from MAGA destruction. Republicans are vulnerable and we're ready to put them on defense.

**So if you're ready to take action now:[Will you pitch in $5 before midnight to fight hard for a Democratic Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250526-ChuckSchumer-SchumerOurStrategyFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250526-ChuckSchumer-SchumerOurStrategyFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20347%2E9716520%2EBgNfrZ)**

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250526-ChuckSchumer-SchumerOurStrategyFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250526-ChuckSchumer-SchumerOurStrategyFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20347%2E9716520%2EBgNfrZ)
---

**Here's what I want you to know:**

**1\. We can't assume how any state will vote.**

**Last year, Senate Democrats won _multiple_ states Trump carried.** Those unlikely victories have left the new Republican majority on the edge and left _us_ a clear path back to Democratic control.

If the same thing happens next year, we'll quickly be knocking on the door of a Democratic Senate again -- _so let's get Trump's MAGA allies on the run._

**2\. We're looking at _plenty_ of flippable seats and winnable races.**

We're keeping our eyes on every chance to turn seats blue. **Trump's MAGA majority is _vulnerable_ and they know it.** Lots of far-right Republicans will be up for re-election this time -- and with special elections in Florida and Ohio, we just gained _even more_ opportunities to net the seats we need.

**3\. Control of the Senate will come down to how we prepare _now._**

Opportunities are great, but WINS are what matter. These races won't be easy, and the GOP will come after us with everything they've got. We need to be ready to fight for every state on the map to unseat MAGA extremists.

**But Democrats know how to win tough fights.** We know it takes dedication, courage, and strength. I'm putting everything I've got into this team because I've seen the impact of what you can do when we come together -- and I know with you by my side, we'll win this.

**[Can I count on you to get fired up and fuel our fight ahead with $5? Act quick before the midnight deadline! The better prepared we are _today_ , the harder we can fight _for tomorrow_ >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250526-ChuckSchumer-SchumerOurStrategyFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250526-ChuckSchumer-SchumerOurStrategyFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20347%2E9716520%2EBgNfrZ)**

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Nancy Pelosi [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP42/1/88466/images/20250526_em_ex_b1_np4c_1.jpg]

Dear Friends,

In San Francisco and in every city and town across America, we mark Memorial Day as a solemn and sacred day of remembrance of the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice for the country that they and we love.

It is a day to honor our fallen servicemembers for their sacrifice defending our Constitution and our Democracy and to lift up and recommit to caring for the beloved Gold Star Families they left behind. May the example of our fallen heroes inspire us to live up to the ideals that they fought for as we build a brighter future for our country that honors the vision of our founders and the aspiration of our children and that is worthy of their ultimate sacrifice.

On this Memorial Day especially, we must come together as one nation with one destiny and echo their bravery, patriotism and commitment to the cause of freedom by upholding our Constitution, speaking truth to power and preserving our government of, by and For The People.

Wishing you a blessed Memorial Day from our family to yours,
NANCY
Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District.
She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support?

He’s always thrown attacks at me – all because I'm holding him and his administration accountable for their efforts to undermine our rights, our democracy, and the rule of law.
**Let me be clear:** I will _not_ be intimidated.

I've said it before, and I'll say it again: I won't kowtow to bullies, no matter how much power or money they have.

I took action to restore and protect Emergency Preparedness and Disaster Relief Funding.

And my office and I won a court order stopping the dismantling of the Department of Education.
Unlike Donald Trump, I'm not wasting time on personal attacks. I'm fighting for the people – and that means standing up for our democracy, our rights, and the rule of law.
**But to keep up this work, I need your support. The far-right is mobilizing to try and discredit me, while they distract from the real issues. name: Trump Tank Parade Alert via Our Revolution
subject: THIS is how Trump honors the military?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1011&refcode=email-20250526_v&akid=8545%2E5885482%2EAmpfeL ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Donald Trump is spending Memorial Day scaling up his plans to send 7,000
American troops into our nation's capital – to lead a tank parade
celebrating his birthday. Make no mistake: rather than paying sincere
tribute to those who sacrifice for our country, Trump is focused on
pulling off a spectacle of ego and authoritarian display.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29367?source=email-20250526&t=1061&akid=8545%2E5885482%2EAmpfeL ]Headline: 7,000 soldiers to march in Trump's military parade on his
birthday

Let us be clear – lining Pennsylvania Avenue with tanks and soldiers is
NOT how America honors troops. Holding extravagant military spectacles to
glorify a sitting president is something dictators and monarchs do – not
elected leaders in a democracy.

That’s why Our Revolution is rapidly mobilizing our 57,000 strong Citizen
Action Team to send Trump a clear, unequivocal message: you are NOT king.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250526nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8545%2E5885482%2EAmpfeL ]As Trump rolls tanks through the streets, we’ll be protesting in a MASSIVE
national action—with more than 700 protests coast to coast. We’re
organizing dozens of these events for a ‘No Kings Day of Defiance’ to
drown out Trump's shameful authoritarian parade. Can you chip in $5 today
to make it possible?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250526nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8545%2E5885482%2EAmpfeL ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250526nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8545%2E5885482%2EAmpfeL ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250526nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8545%2E5885482%2EAmpfeL ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250526nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8545%2E5885482%2EAmpfeL ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250526nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8545%2E5885482%2EAmpfeL ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250526nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8545%2E5885482%2EAmpfeL ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

While Trump spends lavish sums to stroke his ego with tanks, fighter jets,
and fireworks, he has quietly gutted federal programs, disproportionately
hurting military families – including thousands of veterans struggling to
earn stable incomes to support their families.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29367?source=email-20250526&t=1060&akid=8545%2E5885482%2EAmpfeL ]Headline: Trump's federal workforce cuts jeoprardize the careers of
nearly 900,000 veterans and veteran or military spouses

This hypocrisy is staggering and unacceptable.

The U.S. Army's 250th anniversary should honor sacrifice, heroism, and
patriotism – not the vanity of a leader who would use our military and
taxpayer funds as political props. Trump's tank show is an insult to the
very troops he claims to honor. It’s a slap in the face to veteran
families devastated by budget cuts he's directly responsible for.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250526nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8545%2E5885482%2EAmpfeL ]That’s exactly why Our Revolution is organizing a massive grassroots
action to drown out this authoritarian spectacle. But protests of this
magnitude take major resources – can we count on you to donate today to
fuel our work to show Trump that our democracy is more powerful than tanks
rolling down our streets?

History tells us silence in the face of authoritarian tendencies allows
them to grow bolder. So let us stand proudly and loudly together now
before it's too late.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

establishment by committing to be a 2025 Movement Builder

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
Honor These Heroes| | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7236ea013ae0417eb1abc0a2917e41f3&_e=cQdvTvHLwgJ8fTB3IXXbODTYkV0ufoG730fvY63r8nQ99Yx2cw_q02R_MN1Dr29IBHOqdnUczZ7ZtHKAiXUZqJrlotJv7iw7ydk5atTqhB-Mc2YoMes3oESzG2FA5cCOlH7_9goAC5tk1apS4Nnn13sEbTMVe1nnv03hVFlV9BHhfjNwsMcGBZKypAFIq4L0AilfRK3qk8cEkDPH5OCqQ7NfcoLWUG43AT5XDPRVwpAXoc10ebiKZwdvcHW1u6BhOcqrw6AHSgMRlz8jq8xhdB3ztg0ZpvLTqDG9vngoPO35ndhjgHZoVfI260hD6pH8)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7236ea013ae0417eb1abc0a2917e41f3&_e=cQdvTvHLwgJ8fTB3IXXbODTYkV0ufoG730fvY63r8nQ99Yx2cw_q02R_MN1Dr29IBHOqdnUczZ7ZtHKAiXUZqJrlotJv7iw7ydk5atTqhB-Mc2YoMes3oESzG2FA5cCOlH7_9goAC5tk1apS4Nnn13sEbTMVe1nnv03hVFlV9BE8v84Y9oaBM8gjuoWWU5LNXkyZXk9xCCUQZ2wIvnVR-_27VwfopB_UA9jRbSJGF3n3l3EofzO6czxQI7qv6Uwpcv6n0wcOtHGMn-FC5we-XtMWLD3QdjB9ZigaOeGGzt0WMPwtOevMVj6JSUAGgWg1)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7236ea013ae0417eb1abc0a2917e41f3&_e=cQdvTvHLwgJ8fTB3IXXbODTYkV0ufoG730fvY63r8nQ99Yx2cw_q02R_MN1Dr29IBHOqdnUczZ7ZtHKAiXUZqJrlotJv7iw7ydk5atTqhB-Mc2YoMes3oESzG2FA5cCOlH7_9goAC5tk1apS4Nnn13sEbTMVe1nnv03hVFlV9BEtX9SoctiC97QONQ2v5KpFQIl-RPJYNMY3eAz3q_itTYW0DmLBOmKS5Rykp8LoNpYzxfQjojbvLRMyDiintifsAFNM0iLebHP3dVa0jzukCRpuoGBzxGMIXB37R4LypeZC0ppeHUdmO4cbMEv0VZFl)
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7236ea013ae0417eb1abc0a2917e41f3&_e=cQdvTvHLwgJ8fTB3IXXbODTYkV0ufoG730fvY63r8nQ99Yx2cw_q02R_MN1Dr29IBHOqdnUczZ7ZtHKAiXUZqJrlotJv7iw7ydk5atTqhB-Mc2YoMes3oESzG2FA5cCOlH7_9goAC5tk1apS4Nnn13sEbTMVe1nnv03hVFlV9BGX1HBSogYvxW6loF4kpIlC1QfajQtfpc-bD8uFLv0eK8_zheRUX58ethgKn4YeISk5gxxGPAEtAzakQSBfhQUpR0U2Ih47U3df-VBhn1DSWJhtyw7cnKNFutlFMQRG89dXH03l6_rlZP3A5C2g0OkN)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7236ea013ae0417eb1abc0a2917e41f3&_e=cQdvTvHLwgJ8fTB3IXXbODTYkV0ufoG730fvY63r8nQ99Yx2cw_q02R_MN1Dr29IVMZ4RdKOfb8BLeyN_rQeHghQwJgavzKpG4kGqOJakJxlzW91wJ6LxzgFk2qgemac0A7OWc4xkVBRlU_G6Q7j7bO7X3F5Y8nlFeZxiQedKX-vCGMEFl7pLlwmELresmUefmlDSDgVb1dGtoJbamctu8XiEi0LV-c5DOLWqqiB92YBPjLNQlMk87U5YT01u_e65OQ6_LRkjnIgNyxTVSB6xYj7F2bFIjWVDlF67ILqmRc%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7236ea013ae0417eb1abc0a2917e41f3&_e=cQdvTvHLwgJ8fTB3IXXbODTYkV0ufoG730fvY63r8nQ99Yx2cw_q02R_MN1Dr29IBHOqdnUczZ7ZtHKAiXUZqJrlotJv7iw7ydk5atTqhB-Mc2YoMes3oESzG2FA5cCOlH7_9goAC5tk1apS4Nnn13sEbTMVe1nnv03hVFlV9BGqXtd-1cLo48iK-j5EjyluVhc7NnYHXY1jydlORi3-fECAf5053T1fUBXUeq0ZotVGt15XX2B9gx4gysoQU4-BGUqlMReOpQFLTVmPCwpAIqldQF8iVYmd65oIbq-wrKj8ym7XtGypwqZ_LvMHDt1J) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7236ea013ae0417eb1abc0a2917e41f3&_e=cQdvTvHLwgJ8fTB3IXXbODTYkV0ufoG730fvY63r8nQ99Yx2cw_q02R_MN1Dr29IBHOqdnUczZ7ZtHKAiXUZqJrlotJv7iw7ydk5atTqhB-Mc2YoMes3oESzG2FA5cCOlH7_9goAC5tk1apS4Nnn13sEbTMVe1nnv03hVFlV9BEEVFGMcaYodHoqyC668ho6p5ptto5EN6vK31Dd7E5s0tVi3vTvjNKySD4345hpIza897vu4P5yI1s7x_VrFmPlQW8o8yrB_Dp-bVrs1Zbz-imRWbD2l8Y6qFGJSTXHUUHG2L9PQjU5xcts0mSYWGhC)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=7236ea013ae0417eb1abc0a2917e41f3&_e=cQdvTvHLwgJ8fTB3IXXbODTYkV0ufoG730fvY63r8nQ99Yx2cw_q02R_MN1Dr29IBHOqdnUczZ7ZtHKAiXUZqJrlotJv7iw7ydk5atTqhB-Mc2YoMes3oESzG2FA5cCOlH7_9goAC5tk1apS4Nnn13sEbTMVe1nnv03hVFlV9BF9imnGStomCOZs6eBht__CKPTAc1Nxt3pwVr7rDUlgEIcWfLfBcrcnZgOEbKcTllBiylv6pNT7rvPf6n_QP4wSsaRmLLKcHvrPoqErv1qphYd2f4K4ErfR3rOS25zscNf2vYBWLUttHRVXLrJkTwOC)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---

clean_body: Honor These Heroes| | | Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Memorial Day is dedicated to honoring and mourning the military personnel who died while serving in the U.S. Armed Forces.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/977093d9-17dd-416f-bce5-87befb764cf7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Here in the Northeast, it's a chilly start to what many consider the unofficial beginning of summer. But perhaps the less-than-perfect weather is a reminder -- a chance to embrace the true spirit of the day. Memorial Day is not just a long weekend; it is a time for reflection, remembrance, and gratitude. **A moment to honor those who gave their lives defending our nation and securing the freedoms we often take for granted.**
[ Pledge your support](https://substack..Ei8-FfKMxlEocBoTKZIY9hQHVwMVmxz9RktfqVVpqv8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164490903)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=164490903&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0NDkwOTAzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDgyNzQ3MzcsImV4cCI6MTc1MDg2NjczNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AaUwgeBMKl_tBG-M_MmZCU40azX46l5f95ULdN3A75g)
This isn't just another three-day weekend. It's a solemn pause to reflect on the ultimate sacrifice made by so many -- in so many places, in so many conflicts.
**How can we honor these brave souls?**
One way is to express gratitude. Not just to those who have served and those currently in uniform, but also to our first responders who protect and serve our communities every day. If you've never thanked a service member or first responder, take a moment this weekend. It's a small act that carries deep meaning. And when they humbly reply, "I'm just doing my job," you'll feel how powerful that simple thank-you can be.
**Let us never forget the cost of freedom.**
And let's not forget the joy and unity that can be found this weekend too -- in Memorial Day parades across the country, at veteran cookouts, and in the camaraderie that follows. These moments remind us of what binds us together as a nation. That unity and togetherness is something we need more of.
The brave men and women who serve put aside differences and rise above them. Maybe this weekend, we can take a page from their book. Sit down for a drink, a meal, or a conversation with someone you think you disagree with. You might be surprised by how much common ground you find. In a time where bickering feels endless, let's remember: division is a luxury. Unity is a necessity.
**Let 's honor their sacrifice by living in the spirit of what they fought for -- together.**
It's also a time to remember President Reagan and his Proclamation 5826 - a Prayer for Peace on Memorial Day, 1988 and all Memorial days thereafter "**as a day of prayer for permanent peace " and "designate[d] the hour beginning in each locality at eleven o'clock in the morning of that day as a time to unite in prayer."**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/45768171-d64f-49ec-8ff0-3a274104c283?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**Prayer and Faith are somewhat lacking in challenging times like this with global conflict around the world and I encourage you to take a moment this weekend to pray for peace across the globe.**_
By Jonathan and Michael Goldstein

Dear Peter,
---
Happy Memorial Day from the Let Us Worship Team. As we remember and honor those military men and women who have died while serving America, we reflect on how the Lord has blessed this country. [](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21530/6374453/4746159b3430add8f77ed40fda2f73180a3fc300/3f438daa2f982f67729d75af48117e369b157d34)
## He went on to say that he honestly didn't expect things to get this big and he knew he would receive scrutiny from fans and sponsors for this, but he felt it was a time...

clean_body: Peter, While no one is paying attention, the Radical Left is setting their sights on our state and local governments to resist the America First agenda. Luckily, we're not going to let that happen... We're putting together a task force of our most dedicated patriots to stand with us against the Democrats' Radical agenda in states across America. Peter, you've been identified as a crucial part of this effort. State Defender Society is a highly selective group and it would be an absolute honor to have you join its ranks. Are you ready to stand up for our states in the face of the Radical Left? joining the ranks of the State Defender Society, you're drawing a line in the sand alongside a fierce coalition of State Republicans who refuse to back down. This is your moment to make a real difference and send a clear message to the Radical Left that we won't back down. Sincerely, CeCe, State Defender Society| By providing your mobile phone number, you are consenting to receive calls and texts and P2P messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from RSLC and its affiliated PACs. Message frequency may vary. Msg&Data Rates May Apply. Reply STOP to cancel. Reply HELP for help. I served in the United States Marine Corps because I believe true patriotism means more than just loving your country. It means putting something on the line for it.

Patriotism is sacrifice. It's showing up when it is hard. It's believing this country is worth saving even when the people in charge act like it is not.

I've seen what happens when the elite make the rules and folks like us are expected to just sit quietly and take it. They don't want you to know how powerful your voice can be.

clean_body: I served in the United States Marine Corps because I believe true patriotism means more than just loving your country. It means putting something on the line for it. Patriotism is sacrifice. It's showing up when it is hard. It's believing this country is worth saving even when the people in charge act like it is not. I've seen what happens when the elite make the rules and folks like us are expected to just sit quietly and take it. They don't want you to know how powerful your voice can be. ** **** ******************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************** ************ I've been where you are. And now I'm sitting in the West Wing with a chance to do something about it. But I can't do it alone. **************** For our kids. For our values. For America. JD Vance Vice President of the United States Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: This Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
This Memorial Day, I join Americans across the country in remembering and honoring the brave American men and women who have sacrificed their lives for our country and our freedom.
We can honor their memories and their sacrifice by carrying on their fight for our country, our values, and our democracy. And we need to do that now, in every way we can.
Over the last several months, I have been reading and listening to histories of our country and thoughtful analyses of the moment we are living in. The stories are compelling, inspiring, and sobering. It is clear that in this moment, all our veterans have fought and sacrificed so much for—including their lives—is under attack.
In 2025, we have seen overwhelming efforts to undermine the core functions of our government, the separation of powers, and the rule of law itself. We cannot let them succeed. Too many people have sacrificed too much for us to let this happen. We must come together as Americans. We do that by engaging with one another as often as we can, by continuing to work together in all the ways we can, making our voices heard in all the places we can, and by standing up for our freedom—freedom generations of servicemen and women have fought and died for.
Let’s do our part to carry on their commitment to, and belief in, our country.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]
3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098

# Happy Memorial Day PolitiBrawlers,
As we remember America's heros and spend time with friends and family today, President Trump is preparing to address the nation from Arlington National Cemetery. Watch the much anticipated address live below along with some other important political clashes from last week.
Enjoy this day of rest and remembrance ,
**The PolitiBrawl Team**
* * *
Watch as President Trump delivers Memorial Day remarks to American soldiers and veterans from Arlington National Cemetery.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7740fa5a-aca5-403b-9cf4-9cd4dcc6b4d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# MAGA Tom Homan DESTROYS smug Ari Melber for accusing Trump of targeting political enemies
Trump Border Czar Tom Homan **[destroyed NBC's Ari Melber](https://substack.com/redirect/ef413b60-b27f-4800-8693-764feab10c31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for accusing the Trump administration of politically targeting adversaries with the justice system.
**[This gets heated:](https://substack.com/redirect/ef413b60-b27f-4800-8693-764feab10c31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ef413b60-b27f-4800-8693-764feab10c31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ef413b60-b27f-4800-8693-764feab10c31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Melber pressed Homan about the Trump's administration's investigations into several high level critics of the president, including James Comey, Letitia James, and Andrew Cuomo. "Can you think of or name any public official or individual who is in these crosshairs other than those folks?!" Melber asked.
**["Those who break the law should be prosecuted,](https://substack.com/redirect/ef413b60-b27f-4800-8693-764feab10c31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**... have any of those people been prosecuted other than the congresswoman (who allegedly stormed and I.C.E facility), other than the two judge who impeded I.C.E who tried to harbor and conceal an illegal alien and impede their enforcement efforts?" Homan fired back. "Are you telling me everybody on the list has been indicted?!"
Melber pressed Homan again, "It looks like to some that this is political targeting! The ACLU says it's autocratic targeting, and you respond and say 'they did it! The Democrats did it,' does that make it okay?!"
"Wait a minute!" Homan halted the interview. "I said I find it shocking that they would accuse the Trump administration of weaponizing against their opponents when they did the exact thing during the Biden administration. I'm not maing any comparison, I'm just saying I find it shocking for them to make that claim!!"
Watch Homan take a bulldozer to NBC:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ef413b60-b27f-4800-8693-764feab10c31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

# **Tired of AARP? There 's a Better Option - And It's FREE**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dc028ab1-5a3c-4ff1-83d0-3ba2869b95a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you're 50 or older and looking for a conservative alternative to AARP, now's the perfect time to make the switch.
AMAC - the Association of Mature American Citizens - is America's fastest-growing senior organization, and right now, they're offering a **FREE membership** for a limited time. That's right - no credit card, no strings attached.
With AMAC, you'll be part of a community that shares your values: faith, family, and freedom. Members enjoy access to exclusive benefits, including:
* **Money-saving discounts** on travel, insurance, and everyday essentials
* The **AMAC Magazine** , packed with news and insights from a conservative perspective
* Updates on the issues that matter most to you - like Social Security, Medicare, Border Security, and more!
* A chance to get involved through **AMAC Action** , their grassroots advocacy network

Whether you're looking to save money, stay informed, or make a difference, AMAC is here for you - and now it won't cost you a dime to get started.
**[👉 Join the movement today and claim your free membership at](https://substack.com/redirect/dc028ab1-5a3c-4ff1-83d0-3ba2869b95a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Claim My Free Membership](https://substack.com/redirect/dc028ab1-5a3c-4ff1-83d0-3ba2869b95a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
