Happy Memorial Day from all of us at the Sean Spicer Show. Today we honor and mourn the brave men and women that died during their service in the United States Armed Services. To all the brave men and women that paid the ultimate price while in uniform, we never forget your service to this country and honor your memory. On today's show we are going to replay an interview I had with Senator Cory Gardner, looking forward to the 2026 Senate Midterm elections. Senator Cory Gardner is the Chairman of the Senate Leadership Fund. As a former Senator from Colorado and the U.S. Congressman in Colorado's District 4, Gardner's role now focuses on making and keeping a Senate Republican majority. Gardner is the perfect person to walk us through the 2026 Senate Midterm elections. With President Trump adding Jd Vance as Vice President and Marco Rubio as Secretary of State, 2 special elections will take place in Ohio and Florida. Both those states are Republican strongholds with Lieutenant Governor Jon Husted in Ohio and Senator Ashley Moody in Florida, both expected to hold their seats. We then dive into current ruby red states and seats that both Gardner and I expect Republicans to hold. As for the Democrats, we cover all the states in their favor, including strongholds like Oregon and Massachusetts that they expect to win. The swing states in play are shaping up for some very competitive races and Gardner gives us the inside look at the races and candidates shaping the elections. Make sure you watch to the end to see if Republicans could walk away with an even bigger majority in 2026.
Featuring:
Senator Cory Gardner
Chairman | Senate Leadership Fund
Former U.S. Senator, Colorado
Former U.S. Congressman, Colorado, District 4 https://www.senateleadershipfund.org/

name: Devin
subject: NEW VA protest! Overpasses & more this #TeslaTakedownTuesday 🔥
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Devin for Progress
body:
This simple sign says it all: Be Very Brave. Seattle keeps showing up and now we have 13 protests every week. Join us!

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1179d2388dd3/seattles-biggest-teslamusk-protest-yet-42094?e=10cc7d1928)
---
|

[|

---](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=add71d9ce2&e=10cc7d1928)
| I love this simple message: “Be Very Brave!” A lot is being asked of us and people in Seattle always show up. **We now have 13 protests every week in the Seattle area and EIGHT this Tuesday. Please join us!**
---
| [SEE EVENT LIST!](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=f820f755b8&e=10cc7d1928)
---
|

On this Memorial Day, **what better way to honor those who sacrificed than signing up for** [new, weekly protests at the VA Hospital](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=4229809a80&e=10cc7d1928)? Or commit to helping with the morning Seattle [overpass protests at Yesler](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=a3cebdfe52&e=10cc7d1928) and [50th,](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=105f84d7e7&e=10cc7d1928) the afternoon [overpass protest in West Seattle](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=548a5e04d3&e=10cc7d1928), or one of our [Tesla dealership protests](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=27faff8e74&e=10cc7d1928). We’re sending a powerful message: **We won’t stand by why vets, immigrants, students, federal workers, and more suffer to provide huge tax cuts to Elon and his buddies.**
[**CLICK HERE TO SIGN UP!**](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=8684a677c0&e=10cc7d1928)
— Devin
#TeslaTakedownTuesday
PS. Our regular Saturday protests are also listed on the site! Register early so we know how many people to expect.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108408440/547827189/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250526_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjE4ZDE1My04MzNhLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0o1YP543_2l2GHTomkKWPC0nGoAIMyUlyaDTm9z7hbk=)
---
Peter — **As we celebrate our wedding anniversary today, I’m filled with gratitude and admiration for my husband, Wiley.** Since the first day we met, I've been captivated by his heart, integrity, and commitment to making a difference in the world. These are the qualities that not only made me fall in love with him, but continue to inspire me every day. Here’s us celebrating on our wedding day: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108408441/547827190/474294398?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250526_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjE4ZDE1My04MzNhLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0o1YP543_2l2GHTomkKWPC0nGoAIMyUlyaDTm9z7hbk=) **Wiley is a man dedicated to service.** Whether he's advocating for working families, supporting quality public education, or fighting for voting rights, his focus is always clear: to build a better, stronger North Carolina. I see firsthand his determination and passion to uplift our community and deliver positive change for working families. His dedication to public service is not just a job — **it's his calling.** _One of the things I cherish most about Wiley is his ability to listen and genuinely care for those around him. His compassion knows no bounds, and our two wonderful children are proud of the example he sets. Wiley’s vision for North Carolina is rooted in values that prioritize democracy, equality, and effective solutions for everyone._ [**Peter, let’s keep this between us: as a special anniversary surprise, I want to show Wiley just how much support he has from folks who share his vision for a brighter North Carolina. By pitching in today, you can help fuel our grassroots movement and help reach our big end-of-month goal. Will you make a contribution and be part of this special anniversary surprise?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108408442/547827191/474294398?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250526_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjE4ZDE1My04MzNhLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0o1YP543_2l2GHTomkKWPC0nGoAIMyUlyaDTm9z7hbk=) | [PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108408443/547827192/474294398?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250526_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjE4ZDE1My04MzNhLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0o1YP543_2l2GHTomkKWPC0nGoAIMyUlyaDTm9z7hbk=)

Thanks for celebrating with us!
Warm regards,
Caroline Edwards Nickel

Derek: We can't ignore that these are difficult times. With tariffs and trade wars, national security breaches, funding freezes, and now a GOP budget bill that slashes food assistance programs and Medicaid in order to give tax cuts to billionaires – **we're seeing absolute chaos in our government.**
**Unfortunately, the people these actions are affecting the most are the people in our own homes and our own communities:_hardworking Americans._** As a longtime resident of Southeastern Pennsylvania and now as Representative in Congress, Chrissy has continuously fought to solve real problems for the people of Berks and Chester Counties.
**But a big part of that fight is making sure _your voice_ is heard in Congress. So with breaking headlines that directly impact our communities coming out every day, we're asking top supporters like you to weigh in. **

clean_body: Will you please share your thoughts? | | | Derek: We can't ignore that these are difficult times. With tariffs and trade wars, national security breaches, funding freezes, and now a GOP budget bill that slashes food assistance programs and Medicaid in order to give tax cuts to billionaires – we're seeing absolute chaos in our government. Unfortunately, the people these actions are affecting the most are the people in our own homes and our own communities:hardworking Americans. As a longtime resident of Southeastern Pennsylvania and now as Representative in Congress, Chrissy has continuously fought to solve real problems for the people of Berks and Chester Counties. But a big part of that fight is making sure your voice is heard in Congress. So with breaking headlines that directly impact our communities coming out every day, we're asking top supporters like you to weigh in. | | Hearing from you directly helps our team better represent our community’s priorities. Thank you for your feedback, Team Chrissy | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. Box 222 Devon, PA 19333 United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click . If you'd like to receive fewer emails like this one, or if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please Chrissy is a former Captain in the United States Air Force. name: Bryan
subject: May 26 Campaign Update
body:
This Memorial Day, we remember those who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our nation.

| | | | | [|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=d33a236547&e=e907534017)
| | | | | **May 26, 2025**
---
| Here’s an update from our campaign:
---
| | | | |
# Honoring our Heroes
---
| On Memorial Day, we remember and honor the more than [**1 million**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=3bb02b6ed9&e=e907534017)**** U.S. service members who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our nation.
---
| For [**250 years**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=07ac55528b&e=e907534017) , since “the shot heard ‘round the world” rang out at the Battles of Lexington and Concord, our brave men and women in uniform have protected our nation and our freedom.
Today, I joined ceremonies and parades in Burlington and Rochester to commemorate these heroes and honor their legacy.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=e41b0fbfd9&e=e907534017)
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=3d42e3a5c8&e=e907534017)
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=2a2c75c7df&e=e907534017)
| These include heroes like [**Staff Sergeant Ralph Bode**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=9d5c780259&e=e907534017)**,** a Washington Park High School graduate, who enlisted to fight in WWII and was shot down over Kassel, Germany in 1944.
SSG Bode’s remains were thought lost until [**last year**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=9ab485262b&e=e907534017) , when the Department of Defense positively identified him.

# Reconciliation Passes the House
Last week, I voted to pass the _One Big Beautiful Bill Act_ that will help secure our border, put working families first, and eliminate fraud and wasteful spending.
* **Secures our border**
* Builds 700 miles of new border wall
* Funds 8,000 new border and customs officers
* Expands ICE detention centers

* **Strengthens Medicaid and removes fraud from the program**
* Requires citizenship verification
* Removes ineligible recipients
* Institutes work requirements for able-bodied adults

* **Makes it easier for working families to make ends meet**
* Prevents a $1,500 tax increase
* New $4,000 deduction for seniors
* Preserves Child Tax Credit

House Republicans were able to institute these reforms while protecting Social Security and Medicare, putting American families over illegal immigrants.
This bill now heads to the Senate for passage.
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
| [DONATE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=70034d4ea3&e=e907534017)
---
|
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/steilforwisconsin/march-14050695?e=e907534017)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * PO Box 103 * Oak Creek, WI 53154-8618 * USA
[update your preferences](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&e=e907534017&c=bdb26b564d) or [unsubscribe](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&t=b&e=e907534017&c=bdb26b564d)
---
|
---

_** Even if you do not regularly visit your public library, your input is invaluable for our ability to fend off Republican-led assaults on free speech and free access to information. **

[_Please, friend, respond right away >>_](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61595?t=6&akid=23085%2E4449941%2ERVAZgz)_
Public libraries are an invaluable part of our society.

They provide the opportunity for people of all ages and from all backgrounds to learn, communicate and participate in their communities _– and they must be protected at all costs._

**However, GOP state lawmakers are trying to destroy these hubs of public education by BANNING books, DEFUNDING public libraries and turning them into a BATTLEFIELD for their ideological culture war.**
_**[If we’re going to save our public libraries, we need accurate data on their patronage. So, friend, please answer this urgent poll right away.
